title: Bhadreshwar Jain Temple

overview.short: Bhadreshwar Jain Temple, also known as Vasai Jain Temple, is a historical importance located in Bhadreshwar village of Mundra Taluka, Kutch, Gujarat, India.

topPlaces.name: Bhadresar
topPlaces.description: Bhadresar or Bhadreshwar is a village in Mundra Taluka, Kutch district of Gujarat, India. It is about 27 km from Taluka headquarters Mundra and barely a kilometer away from the seashore.

topPlaces.name: Vira, Kutch
topPlaces.description: Vira is a village in Anjar Taluka in Kutch district of Gujarat, India. Nearby temple of Jogninar is place of religious significance.

items.note: Bhadresar or Bhadreshwar is a village in Mundra Taluka, Kutch district of Gujarat, India. It is about 27 km from Taluka headquarters Mundra and barely a kilometer away from the seashore.
Vira is a village in Anjar Taluka in Kutch district of Gujarat, India. Nearby temple of Jogninar is place of religious significance.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhadreshwar Jain Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhadreshwar Jain Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhadreshwar Jain Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jamnagar Airport (51 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (114 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhadreshwar Jain Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhadreshwar Jain Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhadreshwar Jain Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Bhadreshwar Jain Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhadreshwar Jain Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bhadresar, Vira, Kutch.
